events.1854: Lord Dalhousie captured Jhansi under the East India Company.
events.1912: Lawrence Durrell, Britsh writer (Alexandria Quartet, Private Country), was born in Darjeeling, India. .
events.1931: Chandrashekhar Azad of Hindustan Republican Army shot himself to avoid British police arrest at Alfred Park, Allahabad.
events.1941: Paddy Ashton, first leader of Britain's Social and Liberal Democrat Party, was born in New Delhi, India.
events.1956: G. V. Mavlankar, first speaker of Lok Sabha, passed away.
events.1987: UN Secretary General Javier Perez de Cuellar recieved the Jawaharlal Nehru award for International Understanding.
events.1990: Polls in Pondicherry and eight states.
events.1992: Narasimha Rao elected Congress (I) President in the party poll held after a gap of 20 years.
events.1993: Samir Ranjan Barman, Tripura CM, resigns.
events.1996: Suresh Kalmadi, Minister of State for Railways, presents vote-on-account railway budget; 1995-96 Economic Survey shows 6.3\% growth in GDP; 20\% interim relief for newspaper employees announced by govt.
events.1997: CBI arrests godman Chandraswami for alleged offences in violation of Foreign Contributions (Regulation) Act, 1976.
events.1999: Union Budget presented. Fiscal deficit cut to 4.4 per cent.
